seoTitle: Hawthorn vs Hay Flat — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hawthorn and Hay Flat. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hawthorn vs Hay Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawthorn and Hay Flat.
heading: Hawthorn vs Hay Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawthorn, South Australia and Hay Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hay Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Hawthorn (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawthorn or Hay Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawthorn has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Hay Flat scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawthorn scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Hay Flat scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawthorn or Hay Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hay Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
